title: 中国会计准则（全英文）
description: The Chinese Accounting Standards have promoted the rapid development of the capital market and effectively improved corporate governance of listed companies. The effect of the implementation of Chinese accounting standards is being increasingly recognized by different economies.Since the formulation and implementation of accounting standards are affected by macro and micro factors, this course will, based on China’s institutional environment, systematically present the development process , the specific contents and characteristics of Chinese accounting standards.Through the study of this course, you will gain a deeper understanding of the Chinese Accounting Standards.
